entity: Karl Malone All-NBA selections = 14 (BBR-canonical and warehouse value agree)

query_target.sql: SELECT cast(count(*) AS INTEGER) AS n FROM fact_player_awards WHERE player_id = 252 AND award_type = 'All-NBA'

notes: Karl Malone's 14 All-NBA selections (11 First Team, 2 Second Team, 1 Third Team). BBR and warehouse agree exactly. Retired, so count is fixed at 14. CAST(... AS INTEGER) keeps the count as a JSON number (not BIGINT-as-string) so the equals comparison is numeric.
